## [Note]

dbbot v0.0.1 is the first official release of the unified database automation package.

## [Add]

- Ship a curated release package for MySQL, ClickHouse, monitoring, and the portable Ansible runtime.
- Provide managed GitHub release publication with a repository-backed release note source of truth.
- Include playbook entry points for MySQL deployment, replication, backup, recovery, exporter setup, ClickHouse deployment and restore, and Prometheus, Grafana, and Alertmanager deployment.

## [Change]

- Standardize the release package build through an allowlist-based staging directory before archive creation.
- Unify local archive preparation across the MySQL, ClickHouse, and monitoring playbooks.
- Align the default MySQL example configuration with MySQL 8.4.8 on port 3306 and auto_silent Python interpreter discovery in the sample inventory.

## [Fix]

- Preserve relative symlinks correctly in the portable Ansible runtime inside the curated release package.
- Validate cached local tarballs before reuse and remove broken archives when auto download is allowed.
- Fix minimal CentOS bootstrap for MySQL deployment, add Rocky 9 support for the MySQL glibc2.28 generic package, and fix ClickHouse deployment on SELinux-enabled and openEuler hosts.
